evaluation_criteria.name: Price/Cost
evaluation_criteria.description: Total cost including all fees, taxes, and ongoing costs

evaluation_criteria.name: Technical Capability
evaluation_criteria.description: Technical competence and ability to deliver requirements

evaluation_criteria.name: Experience & Track Record
evaluation_criteria.description: Relevant experience and proven track record

evaluation_criteria.name: Risk Management
evaluation_criteria.description: Risk identification, assessment, and mitigation strategies

evaluation_criteria.name: Probity & Compliance
evaluation_criteria.description: Adherence to probity requirements and regulatory compliance
evaluation_criteria.source_document: CAPH S9 procurement advisory & probity check (2024-11-20)

compliance_requirements.requirement: Probity declaration must be completed by all suppliers
Tender documents must include clear evaluation criteria
Evaluation panel must include at least 3 members
Evaluation must be documented with clear justification
Probity audit trail must be maintained
compliance_requirements.source_document: CAPH S9 procurement advisory & probity check (2024-11-20)

compliance_requirements.requirement: Independent probity advisor required for high-value tenders
compliance_requirements.source_document: CAPH S9 procurement advisory & probity check (2024-11-20)

weighted_1_5.description: 1 = Poor, 2 = Below Average, 3 = Average, 4 = Good, 5 = Excellent

pass_fail.description: Pass = Meets requirement, Fail = Does not meet requirement
pass_fail.source: CAPH S9 procurement advisory & probity check (2024-11-20)

source_documents: CAPH S9 procurement advisory & probity check (2024-11-20)
